programme.title: Jam and Cake Roll
programme.desc: Telmo and Tula make a delicious jam and cake roll with eggs, sugar, flour, strawberry marmalade, shredded coconut, and whipped cream.

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery find a sick crayfish and try to find him a new home with clean water before it's too late.

programme.title: The Underground Wonders
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts explore a cave system and discover there's a whole other world underground, with a river, rock formations, and an array of amazing creatures.

programme.title: Bum Power
programme.desc: The doctors make Billy Bones his very own bum and reveal the power of your gluteus maximus muscle! Meanwhile, Felix comes into the emergency department with a cut eye, and Asia has an injured foot.

programme.title: Veranica Tchalabaeva: Winning Poodle Squad
programme.desc: The GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the most times a dog passes through a roller pushed by a dog in one minute is held by Veranica Tchalabaeva and her dogs. Veranica shares the basics of dog training and what it takes to become the best in the world.

programme.title: Bum Power
programme.desc: The doctors make Billy Bones his very own bum and reveal the power of your gluteus maximus muscle! Meanwhile, Felix comes into the emergency department with a cut eye, and Asia has an injured foot.

programme.title: The Colour of Heat
programme.desc: Eric learns that wearing light colours in the sun keeps you cooler than dark colours. He does an ice cube experiment to how lighter colours reflect light and heat, just like a mirror.

programme.title: It's So Dice
programme.desc: In this episode Eric presents an amazing dice trick: Just by looking at a tower of any number of dice, he can accurately calculate the sum of the hidden faces. How does he do it? And, is it magic ... or is it math?!

programme.title: Eric Makes Wind
programme.desc: Eric learns that an anemometer – an instrument to measure wind speed – is important for sailors and for pilots. Then he learns how to make one himself.

programme.title: Hottentots Holland Nature Reserve - On Angel's Wings
programme.desc: When travelling across a mountain range, the team must cross a dangerous narrow gorge while hanging off cables between heaven and earth. When they discover the only way forward is to jump into a giant waterfall, the team has to make a tough decision.

programme.title: Dreaming
programme.desc: Jessi shares a strange dream, and Naomi uses her dream app to decode it. Soon, everyone's sharing wild dreams-except Robbie, who admits he only has nightmares. With Motor's “In Dreams” machine, the gang dives in to help Robbie experience his first real dream ever.

programme.title: The Underground Wonders
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts explore a cave system and discover there's a whole other world underground, with a river, rock formations, and an array of amazing creatures.

programme.title: The Wonders of DNA
programme.desc: Why do you look so much like your siblings? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of genetics. Have hands-on fun by extracting some of your DNA, and get to know Joe Hin Tjio, the first person to find the exact number of chromosomes in the human body.

programme.title: The Mystery of Alex's Weak Kick
programme.desc: Addison has to figure out why Alex can't kick a soccer ball nearly as well as he used to, in order to correct his game in time for him to pass the team tryouts. Alex thinks he's jinxed, but Donnie has a vested interest in making sure Alex doesn't make the team.

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: Vikings
programme.desc: Like Raven and Little Lewis, the famous giants of the northern mists, the Vikings, are master looters and navigators. Besides being bloody warriors and shrewd negotiators, the Vikings are also great explorers, out to discover the world.

programme.title: The Static-y Shuffle Stumper
programme.desc: When Tess and Alex suddenly start getting electric shocks for no apparent reason, Addison has to solve the mystery or it will be lights out on their act for the school talent competition.

programme.title: I've Got a Lovely Bunch of Coconuts
programme.desc: Monkey has found a coconut which he is very eager to eat. This turns out to be harder than he anticipated. Try as he might he just cannot get it open until...

programme.title: Family Life in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Meet a peasant family in their daily lives, back in the Middle Ages. Dove and Howler are very busy parents! Besides educating their little urchin kids, welcoming a new baby, dealing with daily home life, life for these peasant parents is eventful to say the least!

programme.title: Soapy Sailing
programme.desc: Eric makes a model boat using soap as fuel. The boat moves because the soap breaks the surface tension of the water, causing the water molecules to repel each other and push each other backwards into the boat.

programme.title: E3 - Aboard The Glacier Express, From Zermatt To Saint Moritz
programme.desc: The Glacier Express lays claim to being Switzerland's slowest express train. From the Matterhorn to Engandin, it offers its passengers an unforgettable voyage between Zermatt and Saint Moritz, a journey that includes 291 bridges, 91 tunnels and a chance to appreciate some truly breathtaking scenery.

programme.title: E2 - A Big Test of Skill & Teamwork!
programme.desc: Gecko & the Mechanicals face a big test of skill & teamwork! First, the Mechs are in Garage School when a real emergency comes in. In a role reversal, they must fix Fiona the Firetruck's starter motor while Gecko instructs them! Then, when Blue crashes during a flying race, Gecko must show his skill to repair him. The day ends with a big American football game where Gecko comes up with a clever strategy & a creative fix to help his team win!

programme.title: E2 - From Bathtime to Bedtime Fun!
programme.desc: Go from bathtime to bedtime with Mia & Max! The fun starts with a splashy, bubbly good time as the kids play with their rubber ducks & get nice & clean in the tub. After the bath, it's time to get into pajamas & play a fun game of Peek-a-boo with Mummy using lots of different objects from around the house. Finally, it's time for bed as Daddy & Ella take turns giving Max a cuddle & a teddy bear before he goes to sleep. Night night!

programme.title: E2 - Jill's Super Creative Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Jill for some super creative adventures! It's time for the Princess Ball, & Jill decides to decorate her dress. Baby John accidentally spills paint on it, but Jill discovers that an accident can actually help creativity! Then, she decorates her shoes with sparkly stickers to make them the shiniest ever! The creative fun continues as Jill's dressed up as a pink firefighter to help her brothers & has to work hard to keep her princess bunny happy!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E4 - Blocks, Dancing, Football & Storytime!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning to play together with blocks, dancing, football & storytime! First, Jeff's neat block towers keep getting knocked over by Bubbles, & they must learn to share their space. Then, Fuse refuses to listen to instructions during a dancing game & has to learn how to work as a team. The lessons continue as Bubbles learns not to cheat to win a football game & Jeff has to decide if he will share his new book during storytime.

programme.title: E2 - A Big Test of Skill & Teamwork!
programme.desc: Gecko & the Mechanicals face a big test of skill & teamwork! First, the Mechs are in Garage School when a real emergency comes in. In a role reversal, they must fix Fiona the Firetruck's starter motor while Gecko instructs them! Then, when Blue crashes during a flying race, Gecko must show his skill to repair him. The day ends with a big American football game where Gecko comes up with a clever strategy & a creative fix to help his team win!

programme.title: E2 - Jill's Super Creative Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Jill for some super creative adventures! It's time for the Princess Ball, & Jill decides to decorate her dress. Baby John accidentally spills paint on it, but Jill discovers that an accident can actually help creativity! Then, she decorates her shoes with sparkly stickers to make them the shiniest ever! The creative fun continues as Jill's dressed up as a pink firefighter to help her brothers & has to work hard to keep her princess bunny happy!

programme.title: E4 - Siblings Month: Cody's New Sister!
programme.desc: Celebrate Siblings Month with Cody as he welcomes his new sister, Kendi! First, Cody finds out he's going to be a big brother & helps his family prepare. Then, he excitedly welcomes Kendi home & takes on the role of responsible big brother, helping her get to sleep. The sibling bonding continues as they play peek-a-boo, bounce balloons & make funny faces in the mirror. Watch as Cody learns to share & be the best big brother ever!

programme.title: E2 - Gecko vs Weasel: Ultimate Rivalry
programme.desc: The ultimate rivalry between Gecko & Mr. Weasel heats up! After a big rainstorm, Weasel challenges Gecko to a head-to-head car wash competition. Then, Weasel decides he wants a Mechanical of his own, so he hatches a scheme to try & steal Gecko's secret plans! The rivalry continues as Weasel tries to show off his new sports car but gets stuck, & his automated car wash mistakes Weasel for his car!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Test of Skill & Teamwork!
programme.desc: Gecko & the Mechanicals face a big test of skill & teamwork! First, the Mechs are in Garage School when a real emergency comes in. In a role reversal, they must fix Fiona the Firetruck's starter motor while Gecko instructs them! Then, when Blue crashes during a flying race, Gecko must show his skill to repair him. The day ends with a big American football game where Gecko comes up with a clever strategy & a creative fix to help his team win!

E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E4 - South America
programme.desc: Learn how South America’s rich diversity of weather fuels an even richer diversity of life. Examine the Amazon rainforest’s oxygen-breathing trees, follow the arc of a vast cloud river, and meet flamingos that thrive in the sun’s scorching UV rays.

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories
programme.desc: Discover how weirdness is baked into some animals’ DNA from birth. Check out the bowerbird’s funky mate-attracting dance moves, the Christmas Island crab’s traffic-dodging prowess, and the sockeye salmon’s incredible uphill swimming skills.

programme.title: E2 - Superpowers
programme.desc: Look at the supercharged abilities that give some animals an edge in life. Discover fireflies’ flirty flashes, the tarsier’s incredible night vision, the mantis shrimp’s knockout punch, and the saltwater croc’s prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.title: E7 - Rajan Monkey on a Mission
programme.desc: Rajan is the powerful alpha male who sits at the head of an unusually large troop. He has done well to sustain such a big group, but the future doesn’t look so bright. There are more mouths to feed, and yet his jungle home is shrinking.

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Examine fire’s pivotal role in shaping Australia’s natural world. Tour the devastation left by 2020’s brutal bush-fire season, learn how climate change fuelled this watershed event, and chart the long-term recovery of the continent’s wildlife.

programme.title: E8 - Temple Monkeys on the Run
programme.desc: Nestled on the edge of the ancient city of Jodhpur, the luxurious Temple Gardens are home to a huge troop of Hanuman Langurs, who enjoy a peaceful life of bounty. But the troop has a strict hierarchy.

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories
programme.desc: Discover how weirdness is baked into some animals’ DNA from birth. Check out the bowerbird’s funky mate-attracting dance moves, the Christmas Island crab’s traffic-dodging prowess, and the sockeye salmon’s incredible uphill swimming skills.

programme.title: E4 - The Road to Independence
programme.desc: As the babies grow, new power struggles break out in each troop. Watch as every member, from fierce Queen Crystal to low-ranking Erica, jockeys for position. Meanwhile, the babies start to understand how allies and enemies will shape their future.

programme.title: E5 - Second Chances
programme.desc: Ice Pilots NWTNewly minted copilot Jeff Tapper is excited for his first revenue DC-3, but his inexperience shows when he botches the approach and bounces the landing three times, nearly running off the runway. Meanwhile, for new rampie Prefkar Mony to realize his dream of becoming a DC-3 pilot, he needs to first pass the written IATRA test. He’s been studying for months, but on his first attempt, he fails. With the help of pilot/mechanic Chris Staples, Prefkar retakes the test and passes, but his victory celebration is short-lived when he’s blamed for leaving an expensive shipment of medicine marked “Do Not Freeze” in a courier van during a minus 30 weekend. Later, Mikey and Katie decide to find Joe a new dog and choose Muffy, a three-year-old dog from the SPCA who is ready to leave her pups. They bring her back to the hangar for a test drive. Joe brings DC-3 CUE out of retirement to test fly the plane for Buffalo’s summer sked duty and he brings along Jeff—and Muffy—to see if they’re

programme.title: TV Patrol Express[Live]
programme.desc: TV Patrol Express, hosted by Jeff Canoy and Denice Dinsay is a quick look at the top stories of the day. A fifteen minute fast-paced newscast, it offers a glimpse of breaking news, stories that developed, and updates to watch out for on TV Patrol for the on-the-go viewer.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: Lavender Fields
programme.desc: Jasmin Flores lives a peaceful life in her mountain hometown until she falls for Arthur Pelaez, a man hiding dark secrets. Arthur is tied to a powerful gun cartel and trapped in a marriage to Iris Buenavidez. When Arthur becomes a target over stolen money, Jasmin loses everything and reinvents herself as Lavender Fields, seeking revenge against those who destroyed her life. The series blends romance, betrayal, and vengeance in a high-stakes world of crime and family power struggles.

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 在華麗成功的三位朋友面前，出現一位 10 年前因她們的謊言而成為殺人犯的老朋友，她為揭開三人隱藏在假面之下的真面目而決定背水一戰。而四位老朋友也因一位男人面臨人生漩渦，彼此展開關乎嫉妒和慾望戰爭的故事。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？

programme.title: E43
programme.desc: 此劇敘述年幼便出道養家的一線女演員與PD的愛情故事。女演員因母親賭博的債務及醜聞一夜之間跌落谷底。PD嘗試鼓勵她重新振作，女演員卻消失了……

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.title: Top Chef S17E12 -Lucca
programme.desc: In a Top Chef first, the final five travel to one of the top culinary destinations in the world - Italy. First the chefs must make an apertivo for 30 locals from the town of Lucca that pairs perfectly with a Peroni beer. Then, they have the experience of a chef’s lifetime, hunting the elusive white truffle which they must use in a dish for a Tuscan food festival. There’s no room for error, as the chefs are making dishes for not just Tom, Padma and Gail but avant-garde Italian Chef Cristiano Tomei, Truffle expert Cristiano Savini and a host of locals.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1E2 -It's No Picnic
programme.desc: The Bean Scouts and the Squirrel Scouts settle their mud puddle squabble during a 'friendly' picnic.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1E3 -The Weakest Link
programme.desc: The campers send the Jelly Beans on a 'wild goose chase' so they won't bungle the camp inspection!

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1E4 -Lumpy Treasure
programme.desc: A bunch of mosquito bites forms a treasure map on Raj's behind, and the Jellies hunt for a secret treasure!

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1E5 -Lights Out
programme.desc: Lumpus can't get the Jelly Beans to turn their lights out!

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1E6 -Swimming Buddy
programme.desc: Lazlo helps Raj prepare for the camp swimming test, but Raj is terrified of even the tiniest drop of water!

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1E7 -Tree Hugger
programme.desc: Lumpus and Lazlo butt heads when they both try to catch the elusive 'Migrating Mullberry' tree, which only visits this region once every 100 years.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2E9 -Treehouse Broken
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney challenge Kyle and Salty Mike to a treehouse building competition. Things get out of hand. Need I say more?

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2E10 -My Brand New Salty Mike
programme.desc: Salty Mike is accidentally sold to mysterious Ms. Nasenpickel, who has a tragic history with pets.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2E12 -Don't Cross Here
programme.desc: Elmer Gridlock, the old crossing guard is retiring.

programme.title: Top Chef S17E13 -Parma
programme.desc: In the penultimate episode in the All Stars competition, the chefs are treated to a culinary dream trip to Parma, the legendary home of Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese and Prosciutto di Parma ham. After getting a behind the scenes tour of some traditional multi-generational factories of these exclusive products, the chefs must feature these ingredients in two courses and serve their dishes to a table of 16 Michelin stars. Pasta master, Chef Evan Funke, sits in as the guest judge along with Tom, Padma, Gail and a bevy of celebrated Italian super-star chefs. One chef is eliminated as only the top three will move on to the finale.

programme.title: Top Chef S17E13 -Parma

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2E14 -Big Catch
programme.desc: When our final three chefs find themselves locked in the Rec Room, they'll need to rack their brains to solve clues and uncover the escape key. Once out, they’ll have limited time to impress Guest Judge Brooke Williamson with a sophisticated shellfish dish. Later, the chefs hit the high seas on their very own boat with Head Judge Curtis Stone and world-famous Chef Lorena Garcia. They must try and capture their own fish for the first ever Top Chef Junior Rod & Reel Festival!

programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. programme.title: Trailblazing
programme.desc: The feature program 'Trailblazing' on Shenzhen TV fully illustrates Shenzhen's trailblazing exploration and demonstration role as a pilot demonstration zone for socialism with Chinese characteristics. Through the micro recording approach and small entry points in character stories, the program showcases stories of trailblazing exploration and pioneering efforts in Shenzhen, reflecting the major theme of China's high-quality development.

programme.title: Reveal Time
programme.desc: The prospective touch the nature and human history and future, such as technology and occult in all areas. Through detailed data collection and interpretation of strict logic and reasoning, with the audience close to the truth behind the events, it prys into the mysteries of the magical world.

programme.title: Innovation In Sync, Pioneering The Front!
programme.desc: Innovation in Sync, Pioneering the Front! 'The Frontiers' is your direct link to innovation, powered by the Shenzhen Media Group's AI Lab and China's largest AI models. Get the lowdown on groundbreaking trends-it's all here, served fresh and hot. With our forward-thinking geniuses, every episode is a thrilling journey into the future that's closer than you might think! This program will start in May 27th, tune in every night at 21:20 for a riveting 15-minute exploration.

Twinkle, Twinkle Lucky Stars
programme.desc: Muscles, Kidstuff, Fung, and the gang taking a well-needed vacation in Thailand courtesy of the Hong Kong police department. Also on the trip is police inspector Woo on orders to track down a list of drug dealers from informant Ma. Unfortunately, Ma gets whacked by a Thai crime lord, but he tells Woo as he draws his last breath that he mailed the list to his friend in Hong Kong. Meanwhile, Muscles and the gang are shaking down Lau, a drug dealer who, it turns out, is being targeted by the same baddies that killed Ma...

programme.title: E42
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: The Last Tycoon
programme.desc: It was 1917, China. CHENG was an innocent young man who worked in a grocery store and had no ambition, other than to be with his lovely neighbour, the Peking Opera student QIU. But a fateful night had changed Cheng's life forever, as he literally walked right in the affair between his lady boss and the chief of police. To hide this secret, the chief decided to throw Cheng into prison, accusing him of raping his lady boss. Desolated, Cheng met a cellmate MAO, who happened to have an escape plan. The duo broke out, and Cheng had no choice but to leave his life, and his dream girl behind...
